findings.issue: Missing magic byte validation; extension-only check allows double-extension bypass
findings.evidence_span: upload_service.py: save_upload() accepts report.pdf.jpg when filename.endswith('.jpg')
findings.recommended_fix: Add file content magic byte verification (e.g., using python-magic or a library) instead of relying solely on extension.

findings.issue: Audit log retention days not configured
findings.recommended_fix: Set audit_log_retention_days to a positive integer (e.g., 30) in settings.toml.
